german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant gap exists, with many positions unclassified and accessible without language constraints.

pm_type.title: Customer-facing PMs Lead, Core PMs Trail Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A notable gap exists between customer-facing and core PM roles, indicating potential imbalance in project management focus.

seniority.title: Hiring is spread across multiple levels
seniority.subtitle: No single seniority group clearly dominates the current market.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Mixed Preferences
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating a need for clearer work mode strategies.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream
ai.subtitle: A significant portion of roles now demand AI responsibilities and skills, indicating a shift in industry requirements.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Notable Diversity
industry.subtitle: A balanced pattern indicates a lack of dominant roles, but unclassified positions raise concerns about accessibility.
